subcodes.first_line: Praise and thanksgiving, mention and glorification, peace and splendor, in their highest degree, befit the most holy and most exalted Sanctuary of Him Who is the Intended One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و شکر و ذکر و ثنا و سلام و بها در رتبه اولی ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودیرا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
